reviews.comment:
El Boxes es una estafa. Te cobran los filtros carísimos, no te reconocen las promociones, no te suman puntos serviclub, no te dejan pagar en cuotas con tarjeta y la mano de obra es polémica, le cargaron 7 litros de aceite cuando el manual y cambios anteriores siempre cargo 8. NUNCA LLEVEN EL VEHÍCULO ACÁ.

(Translated by Google)
Boxes is a scam. They charge exorbitant prices for filters, don't honor promotions, don't award Serviclub points, don't allow payment in installments with a credit card, and their labor is questionable. They put in 7 liters of oil when the manual and previous changes always called for 8. NEVER TAKE YOUR VEHICLE HERE.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLLWJhQ1RBEAE
